name: arkadaz
description: Harness engineering and code quality skills for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: tiger-skills
plugins.description: Harness engineering + code quality skills. 19 skills, 6 agents, 8 hooks, 2 commands, and a deterministic linear single-feature workflow: grill → architect → generator (git worktree, branched from dev) → reviewer + security → e2e (integration test) → fast-forward merge to dev (main protected) → cartographer (update docs). Skills are independent units; agents are a bundle of skills.
